name: Leonhard Euler
title: Mathematician & Physicist
bio: Swiss mathematician, physicist, and astronomer who made foundational contributions to numerous areas of mathematics. He is considered one of the greatest mathematicians of all time.
faith: A devout Calvinist who wrote a defense of Christianity called 'Letters to a German Princess,' which included arguments for the existence of God. He held daily family prayers and composed hymns.

sources.title: Leonhard Euler — Wikipedia
sources.note: Biography including his Calvinist faith and defense of Christianity

sources.title: Letters to a German Princess — Wikipedia
sources.note: His work containing arguments for the existence of God

sources.title: Letters to a German Princess — Leonhard Euler
sources.note: Euler's popular letters covering science, philosophy, and theology — includes his arguments for God's existence and the compatibility of faith and reason

sources.title: Leonhard Euler: Mathematical Genius in the Enlightenment — Ronald Calinger
sources.note: Comprehensive biography noting Euler's lifelong devout Calvinist faith and his defense of Christianity against Enlightenment skeptics

tagline: The most prolific mathematician in history, a devout Calvinist
